items.title: Batch gradient descent loop
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  init["initialize theta"] --> forward["forward pass on full data"]
  forward --> loss["compute average loss L"]
  loss --> backward["backward: grad L"]
  backward --> update["theta minus eta times grad L"]
  update --> check{"converged?"}
  check -->|no| forward
  check -->|yes| done["stop"]
items.caption: One epoch in batch GD: compute the exact full-dataset gradient, update θ once, repeat until a stopping criterion is met.

items.title: Step along negative gradient on a loss surface
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  point["current theta on surface"] --> grad["grad L points uphill"]
  grad --> neg["negative grad L downhill"]
  neg --> step["move by eta along minus grad L"]
  step --> new["new theta lower loss locally"]
items.caption: Each update moves θ opposite ∇L—the direction of steepest local loss decrease—scaled by learning rate η.
